steps.title: Interpret the equation
steps.content: The equation $$3x+4y=352$$ comes from counting craft sticks: each triangle uses 3 sticks and each rectangle uses 4 sticks. If $x$ triangles and $y$ rectangles are built, the total sticks used is $3x+4y$, which equals the given total of 352 sticks.

steps.title: Evaluate the given ordered pair
steps.content:
Substitute $x=28$ and $y=67$: $$3(28)+4(67)=84+268=352$$. The left side equals the right side, so the pair satisfies the equation.

This means 28 triangles and 67 rectangles together use exactly 352 sticks; thus, if 28 triangles were constructed, then 67 rectangles were constructed.
That is Choice A.
